sub_mechanisms: M_1: partition attention-head bundle into codim-1 leaves
M_2: choose Reeb-component leaf for current context
M_3: head gating restricted to chosen leaf
stripped_llm_application: Attention-head bundle partitioned into codim-1 leaves; a Reeb-component leaf is selected per context, and head gating restricts attention to heads on that leaf. Holonomy across leaf transitions is tracked to maintain context-bundle consistency.
novelty_claim_stripped: Directional Routing (arXiv:2603.14923) gives per-head learned suppression directions; Union of Experts (2503.02495) uses hierarchical routing. Neither uses a foliated bundle structure.
